A '''battle''' at [[Jabiim/Legends|Jabiim]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] was one of the last battles of the hunt for [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Kalast]], the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] traitor that supplied the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] with datacodes for the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] [[Superweapon/Legends|superweapon]], the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|Death Star I]].

==History==
===Background===
{{Dialogue|Tarkin|Colonel Veers is of the opinion that the Rebel base that launched the attack could not be far away based on the size of their force.|Darth Vader|I have used his information to pinpoint Jabiim as the likely origin point. Allow me to take a force there and crush them once and for all!|Palpatine|More important than destroying their worthless base of operations is finding the identity of the one who revealed the location of this demonstration, my apprentice.|attr=[[Grand Moff/Legends|Grand Moff]] [[Wilhuff Tarkin/Legends|Tarkin]], [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] and [[Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]]|src=<ref name="EaW" />}}

[[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] gathered information across the [[The galaxy/Legends|galaxy]] about the Moff's whereabouts. During a failed Rebel [[Skirmish on Carida|raid]] against [[Carida/Legends|Carida]] during [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Maximilian Veers/Legends|Maximilian Veers's]] demonstration of the new [[All Terrain Armored Transport/Legends|All Terrain Armored Transport]]. Due to the size of the Rebel force, both men quickly calculated that Jabiim was the only planet capable of staging an attack on [[Carida/Legends|Carida]]. Vader gathered a strike force and headed for the planet.

===Space battle===
The Rebels were well prepared for an attack; they had an [[Alliance Space Station]] and a defense fleet in orbit around Jabiim.

The two fleets exchanged fire. Eventually, the Alliance Space Station fell to [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] fire from [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyers]]. The remaining forces tagged up and attempted at one last strike against the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]], but failed. The orbital defenses were down, and the strike team landed on the planet.

===Ground battle===
[[File:The_Rebel_Fortress.jpg|thumb|left|200px|[[All Terrain Armored Transport/Legends|AT-ATs]] attacking the rebel base.]]

The Imperials quickly found out that the local [[Jabiimi]] were supporting the Rebel Alliance, and were fired on when they landed in a small clearing in the local village. Artillery destroyed the homesteads, and the army moved on. Due to the fact that the rebels airspeeders were incapable of flying very well on the planet, this led to the Imperials enjoying the advantage their AT-ATs would not go down as easy, although their [[2-M Saber-class repulsor tank/Legends|2-M Saber-class repulsor tanks]] and [[74-Z speeder bike/Legends|74-Z speeder bikes]] were just as disadvantaged.

[[Stormtrooper/Legends|Stormtroopers]] engaged the Rebel infantry while the bigger vehicles entered the base shield. [[All Terrain Armored Transport/Legends|AT-ATs]] opened fire on the base shield generator, leaving the outpost vulnerable to aerial assault. [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE/sa bombers]] flew down and bombarded the base.

The Imperial force searched through the nearby surviving facilities for information on the whereabouts of [[Kalast]]. They found information on [[Kalast]]'s estate over [[Atzerri/Legends|Atzerri]], and that he was now stationed there.

==Aftermath==
[[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] quickly took action and gathered his forces to head to [[Atzerri/Legends|Atzerri]]. The Galactic Empire had found what it was looking for for the past months.

==Behind the scenes==
This battle was the eighth mission of the Imperial campaign in the [[2006]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Empire at War]]''.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Empire at War]]'' {{1st}}
